description: Researchers will present more than 50 studies at the AACR Annual Meeting
author: danafarber.bsky.social
source_text: This weekend, our researchers will present more than 50 studies at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in San Diego. Learn more about our #AACR26 highlights here: bit.ly/41GQR4I

description: Learn about new computational framework for craving social connection and its links to chronic loneliness. Also opportunities to collaborate and get involved with the lab.
author: shawnrhoadsphd.com
source_text:
Excited to be back in San Diego for #SANS2026! 🌅

Join the poster session today (4/17) to learn about our new computational framework for craving social connection & its links to chronic loneliness: osf.io/preprints/ps...

Also reach out about collaborating & opportunities to get involved w/ the lab

description: Demonstration of how CODA can map whole tumors, organs, and organisms in 3D at single-cell resolution, and integrate spatial transcriptomics, spatial proteomics, IHC, IMC, etc.
author: deniswirtz.bsky.social
source_text:
For those attending AACR26 in San Diego, I will demonstrate how CODA can map whole tumors, organs, and organisms in 3D and at single-cell resolution.

I will also show how CODA can integrate spatial transcriptomics, spatial proteomics, IHC, IMC, etc.

April 17, 3:30 pm, Convention Center

event_name: J Mascis Live show Dino Jr.
description: Improv solo where J Mascis broke a string during the set. The band seamlessly transitioned to a jam while J played a one-handed five-string solo, pulling the broken string, restringing and tuning during the solo with his free hand, then right back to the song.
author: sardonicapathy.bsky.social
source_text:
J Mascis
Live show Dino Jr. Casbah, SanDiego. Don’t remember year or song. Improv solo. 
Broke string in set. 
Band seamlessly transitions to jam as J plays one handed five string solo while pulling broke string, restringing and tuning during the solo with his free hand then right back to the song.
